meta.name: alfred
meta.description: A robust conversational model designed to be used for both chat and instruct use cases.

meta.name: deepseek-llm
meta.description: An advanced language model crafted with 2 trillion bilingual tokens.

meta.name: orca2
meta.description: Orca 2 is built by Microsoft research, and are a fine-tuned version of Meta's Llama 2 models.  The model is designed to excel particularly in reasoning.

meta.name: goliath
meta.description: A language model created by combining two fine-tuned Llama 2 70B models into one.

meta.name: starling-lm
meta.description: Starling is a large language model trained by reinforcement learning from AI feedback focused on improving chatbot helpfulness.

meta.name: llava
meta.description: 🌋 LLaVA is a novel end-to-end trained large multimodal model that combines a vision encoder and Vicuna for general-purpose visual and language understanding. Updated to version 1.6.

meta.name: openchat
meta.description: A family of open-source models trained on a wide variety of data, surpassing ChatGPT on various benchmarks. Updated to version 3.5-0106.

meta.name: neural-chat
meta.description: A fine-tuned model based on Mistral with good coverage of domain and language.

meta.name: deepseek-coder
meta.description: DeepSeek Coder is a capable coding model trained on two trillion code and natural language tokens.

meta.name: mistrallite
meta.description: MistralLite is a fine-tuned model based on Mistral with enhanced capabilities of processing long contexts.

meta.name: codebooga
meta.description: A high-performing code instruct model created by merging two existing code models.

meta.name: yarn-mistral
meta.description: An extension of Mistral to support context windows of 64K or 128K.

meta.name: mistral-openorca
meta.description: Mistral OpenOrca is a 7 billion parameter model, fine-tuned on top of the Mistral 7B model using the OpenOrca dataset.

meta.name: yarn-llama2
meta.description: An extension of Llama 2 that supports a context of up to 128k tokens.

meta.name: xwinlm
meta.description: Conversational model based on Llama 2 that performs competitively on various benchmarks.

meta.name: zephyr
meta.description: Zephyr is a series of fine-tuned versions of the Mistral and Mixtral models that are trained to act as helpful assistants.

meta.name: nexusraven
meta.description: Nexus Raven is a 13B instruction tuned model for function calling tasks.

meta.name: yi
meta.description: Yi 1.5 is a high-performing, bilingual language model.

meta.name: samantha-mistral
meta.description: A companion assistant trained in philosophy, psychology, and personal relationships. Based on Mistral.

meta.name: sqlcoder
meta.description: SQLCoder is a code completion model fined-tuned on StarCoder for SQL generation tasks

meta.name: falcon
meta.description: A large language model built by the Technology Innovation Institute (TII) for use in summarization, text generation, and chat bots.

meta.name: starcoder
meta.description: StarCoder is a code generation model trained on 80+ programming languages.

meta.name: wizardcoder
meta.description: State-of-the-art code generation model

meta.name: mistral
meta.description: The 7B model released by Mistral AI, updated to version 0.3.

meta.name: phind-codellama
meta.description: Code generation model based on Code Llama.

meta.name: wizardlm-uncensored
meta.description: Uncensored version of Wizard LM model

meta.name: wizard-vicuna
meta.description: Wizard Vicuna is a 13B parameter model based on Llama 2 trained by MelodysDreamj.

meta.name: wizardlm
meta.description: General use model based on Llama 2.

meta.name: wizard-vicuna-uncensored
meta.description: Wizard Vicuna Uncensored is a 7B, 13B, and 30B parameter model based on Llama 2 uncensored by Eric Hartford.

meta.name: wizard-math
meta.description: Model focused on math and logic problems

meta.name: open-orca-platypus2
meta.description: Merge of the Open Orca OpenChat model and the Garage-bAInd Platypus 2 model. Designed for chat and code generation.

meta.name: medllama2
meta.description: Fine-tuned Llama 2 model to answer medical questions based on an open source medical dataset.

meta.name: codellama
meta.description: A large language model that can use text prompts to generate and discuss code.

meta.name: stable-beluga
meta.description: Llama 2 based model fine tuned on an Orca-style dataset. Originally called Free Willy.

meta.name: nous-hermes
meta.description: General use models based on Llama and Llama 2 from Nous Research.

meta.name: llama2-uncensored
meta.description: Uncensored Llama 2 model by George Sung and Jarrad Hope.

meta.name: orca-mini
meta.description: A general-purpose model ranging from 3 billion parameters to 70 billion, suitable for entry-level hardware.

meta.name: everythinglm
meta.description: Uncensored Llama2 based model with support for a 16K context window.

meta.name: codeup
meta.description: Great code generation model based on Llama2.

meta.name: vicuna
meta.description: General use chat model based on Llama and Llama 2 with 2K to 16K context sizes.

meta.name: llama2
meta.description: Llama 2 is a collection of foundation language models ranging from 7B to 70B parameters.

meta.name: llama2-chinese
meta.description: Llama 2 based model fine tuned to improve Chinese dialogue ability.
